title: verbascum × crenatum
intro: Verbascum × crenatum, a sterile hybrid of the Verbascum thapsus species, is a flowering plant known for its tall stature and showy yellow blooms. The medicinal properties of Verbascum × crenatum include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Verbascum × crenatum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
